title: piao URN
description: piao-pipeline URN format per kernel/01-identity-model.md §1.1 + §2. Format: urn:piao:<kind>:<scope>:<name>[@<rev>]

kind.description: piao kind enumeration per kernel/01-identity-model.md §2.1 (core) + §2.2 (extended). This enum is the single source of truth; any change requires kernel spec rev bump + M1 ledger entry.

rev.description: Artifact revision suffix per §1.1. v<int> for major rev, v<int>.<int> for minor rev. snapshot/drift/evolution scan_result use major-only.
